name: Pizza
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 450°F. Place four unglazed quarry tiles or pizza stones in the oven while it heats.
In a large bowl or food processor, combine yeast, warm water, and sugar. Let proof until bubbly. Add flour and salt, then stir in remaining warm water and olive oil. Knead until smooth and elastic, adding more flour if needed. Cover and let rise for about 45 minutes.
Divide dough into four equal parts, form into balls, and cover for 10 minutes. Roll each ball into a small circle (10-12 inches). Let rest another 10 minutes, then roll thinner.
Mix garlic with olive oil to make a garlic oil. Brush the dough surface with garlic oil and sprinkle with salt. Spoon about 1/4 cup tomato sauce over the dough. Arrange mushrooms, peppers, and onion on top. Spread cottage cheese like mozzarella. Sprinkle oregano and drizzle with olive oil.
Bake for 10-20 minutes or until crust is golden brown.
